title: Prism V3 Mood and Sleep Records
description: Schema for daily mood, emotional state, stress, sleep, and journaling records in the Prism V3 experiment. Each entry captures the user's psychological and physiological state for one day.

date.description: Calendar date for this daily mood/sleep record (ISO 8601).

mood_score.description: Normalized mood score ranging from 0 (worst) to 1 (best).

primary_emotion.description: Dominant emotion label for the day (e.g. 'calm', 'anxious', 'hopeful', 'numb').

stress_level.description: Self-reported stress level on a 1-10 scale.

sleep_time.description: Time the user went to sleep (e.g. '23:30', '02:00').

journal_keywords.description: Keywords extracted from the user's journal entry for the day.

journal_snippet.description: A short representative excerpt from the user's journal entry.
